segments.nethackrc:
OPTIONS=name:Grok,role:Caveman,race:human,gender:male,align:neutral
OPTIONS=!autopickup,pushweapon,showexp,time,color,lit_corridor
OPTIONS=disclose:yi ya yv yg yc yo
OPTIONS=suppress_alert:3.3.1
OPTIONS=msg_window:reversed
OPTIONS=symset:DECgraphics
OPTIONS=playmode:explore

steps.screen:
[19CIt is written in the Book of Ishtar:

[23CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[23Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[23CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[23Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[23Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[23CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[19CYour goddess Ishtar seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[19Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[19CYou, a newly trained Troglodyte, have been heralded
[19Cfrom birth as the instrument of Ishtar.  You are destined
[19Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[19Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[19Cof us all:  Go bravely with Ishtar!
[19C--More--
